ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number of the experiment */,
  "time_sampling" REAL /* Time taken for sampling */,
  "stoc_pol_mean" REAL /* Mean of the stochastic policy */,
  "stoc_pol_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of the stochastic policy */,
  "stoc_pol_max" REAL /* Maximum value of the stochastic policy */,
  "stoc_pol_min" REAL /* Minimum value of the stochastic policy */,
  "rollout_success" REAL /* Success rate of the rollout */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha parameter value */,
  "delta" REAL /* Delta parameter value */,
  "time_vpg" REAL /* Time taken for Value Function optimization in VPG */,
  "time_npg" REAL /* Time taken for Value Function optimization in NPG */,
  "kl_dist" REAL /* KL divergence */,
  "surr_improvement" REAL /* Surrogate improvement */,
  "running_score" REAL /* Running score */,
  "rwd_sparse" REAL /* Reward sparsity */,
  "rwd_dense" REAL /* Reward density */,
  "success_percentage" REAL /* Success percentage */,
  "num_samples" REAL /* Number of samples */,
  "time_VF" INTEGER /* Time taken for Value Function computation */,
  "VF_error_before" REAL /* Value Function error before optimization */,
  "VF_error_after" REAL /* Value Function error after optimization */,
  "eval_score" REAL /* Evaluation score */,
  "eval_success" REAL /* Evaluation success rate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  "description" TEXT /* Experiment description */,
  "status" TEXT /* Experiment status (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "extras" TEXT /* Additional metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  "extras" TEXT /* Additional metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  "extras" TEXT /* Additional metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_environment" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_algorithm" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_tags" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag associated with the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "tag")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_hyperparameters" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id", "hyperparameter_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "environment_parameters" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id", "parameter_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the result */,
  "result_value" TEXT /* Value of the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "result_name")
)
column_names: Standard deviation of the stochastic policy
Maximum value of the stochastic policy
Minimum value of the stochastic policy
Time taken for Value Function optimization in VPG
Time taken for Value Function optimization in NPG
Time taken for Value Function computation
